goal.description: You are looking for information in Cambridge. You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 21:00 and should go to cambridge. The train should leave on thursday and should depart from birmingham new street. Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 1 people. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for a particular attraction. Its name is called old schools. Make sure you get phone number, entrance fee, and attraction type

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I need a train going to cambridge.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Absolutely! What day and time would you like to leave?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: On Thursday any time after 21:00.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Where will you be departing from?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I will departing from birmingham new street.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: I would recommend TR7324 which leaves Birmingham New Street at 21:40 and arrives at Cambridge at 24:23.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes can you book that for 1 person?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Your booking for one ticket is complete. Your reference number is VEG5Q87Q and 75.09GBP will be due at the station.

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I am also looking for a attraction called old schools.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Yes, Old Schools is located in the centre area, and has no entrance fee. Anything else I can assist you with?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes.  What is the phone number?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Their phone number is 01223332320. Do you need anything else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, what is their entrance fee and attraction type?  Thanks!

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: It is free to enter and type is architecture. May I help you with anything else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: No, you have been very helpful today, thank you.  I am all set.  Goodbye.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Thank you for using our service!

goal.description: You are looking for information in Cambridge. You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should go to stansted airport.
